data.title: Enbridge B.C. Natural Gas Pipeline Expansion Receives Federal Approval
data.description: Enbridge Inc. (Enbridge), a Canadian energy company listed on the TSX and NYSE as ENB, disclosed the approval of the Sunrise Expansion Program by the Canadian Government. The program involves a $4 billion investment for expanding the Westcoast pipeline system with a focus on natural gas.

data.title: Point Wild Appoints Neill Feather Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 24, 2026, in Boston, it was revealed that Hari Ravichandran will be transitioning to the role of Chairman at Point Wild, a prominent global firm specializing in AI-driven cybersecurity solutions. The company appointed Neill Feather as the new Chief Executive Officer. Hari Ravichandran, who had been the CEO since the establishment of the company, will now assume the position of Chairman.

data.title: Scinai Immunotherapeutics Announces $2.61 Million Private Placement Financing
data.description: A recent round of financing was spearheaded by an institutional life sciences investor, bolstered by contributions from both new and existing investors. The funding obtained is intended to aid in the growth of the Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) platform and the progression of customer programs. The company in focus, Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (NASDAQ: SCNI), made this announcement on April 24, 2026, based in Jerusalem. This funding is expected to fuel expansion and innovation within the company.

data.title: Nomad Health Evolves from Staffing Agency to the AI Operating System for Healthcare Staffing Firms
data.description: Today, on April 24, 2026, in New York, Nomad Health revealed its shift from a healthcare staffing agency to a software platform company. The company will provide its exclusive AI operating system to mid-market and enterprise healthcare staffing companies across the country.

data.title: Daewoong Pharmaceutical Hosts 'NABOTA Master Class'… Highlighting Safety Amid Growing Demand for High-Dose, Repetitive Treatments
data.description: A total of 74 healthcare professionals representing 13 different countries recently participated in a comprehensive program focused on the safety of PrabotulinumtoxinA. The program included anatomy sessions, proprietary injection techniques, and personalized hands-on training. Global participants enthusiastically praised the program as a valuable platform for sharing knowledge and expertise in the field.

data.title: Western-Korean Fusion F&B Brand ARIH Launches Exclusively at Walmart U.S.
data.description: Paldo and hy have officially started selling their new F&B brand ARIH, a fusion of Western and Korean cuisine in the United States. The collaboration with popular group BTS has been highly anticipated. The companies announced the launch on April 24, 2026, with hopes of making an impact in the market. The brand aims to offer 'Modern Balanced Food' to American consumers with a variety of products. This partnership intends to capitalize on the growing trend of fusion foods and attract younger demographics. The initiative is backed by significant investment and resources, highlighting the companies' commitment to this venture. With BTS's global influence and the reputation of the Korean food industry, ARIH is positioned for success in the U.S. market.

data.title: LG ELECTRONICS BRINGS OLD SCHOOL BALL TO SMART TVS AND MONITORS WITH NBA BOUNCE
data.description: LG Gaming Portal has partnered with NBA Bounce to introduce classic throwback teams, mascots, and players for fans to experience the nostalgia of basketball. The collaboration brings the excitement of NBA Bounce to LG TVs, allowing fans to engage in shooting, dribbling, dunking, and more. This partnership aims to create an immersive and entertaining basketball experience for users.
US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Air Force General Dan Caine hold a briefing on Iran.

data.title: Booz Allen Expands Autonomy Ecosystem With NODA AI Investment
data.description: Booz Allen Hamilton, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BAH, revealed that its corporate venture capital division, Booz Allen Ventures, has recently invested in NODA AI, a company based in Austin, Texas. NODA AI focuses on autonomy orchestration and acts as a crucial integration layer that allows military operators to coordinate various autonomous systems across different domains and platforms. This investment represents a Series A funding round for NODA AI and is part of Booz Allen's expanding investment portfolio.

data.title: Bitcoin To Hit $145,000 By End Of 2026, Arthur Hayes Predicts
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes has made a bold prediction, anticipating that Bitcoin will surge to $145,000 by the end of the year. He attributes this projected increase to the Federal Reserve's discreet escalation of its balance sheet by $40 billion monthly, coupled with extensive wartime expenditures compelling commercial banks to generate money. Despite prevalent concerns about inflation, Hayes elucidated that the Fed is quietly expanding its balance sheet through reserve management acquisitions at a consistent rate. In light of Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh's remarks before the Senate denoting the adverse effects of quantitative easing on impoverished individuals, Hayes believes that if Warsh assumes office, he will likely perpetuate the balance sheet augmentation policies of his forerunner. Hayes expressed skepticism regarding the Fed's intentions to reduce its balance sheet, emphasizing that reaching a consensus on the guiding principles for this reduction will be a protracted process.
